sessionStart.bash: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event sessionStart; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event sessionStart; else printf '{}'; fi
sessionStart.powershell: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event sessionStart } else { '{}' }

preToolUse.bash: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event preToolUse; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event preToolUse; else printf '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Python is unavailable, so the command guard cannot evaluate this tool call."}'; fi
preToolUse.powershell: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event preToolUse } else { '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Python is unavailable, so the command guard cannot evaluate this tool call."}' }

postToolUse.bash: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event postToolUse; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event postToolUse; else printf '{}'; fi
postToolUse.powershell: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event postToolUse } else { '{}' }

postToolUseFailure.bash: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event postToolUseFailure; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event postToolUseFailure; else printf '{}'; fi
postToolUseFailure.powershell: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python .github/scripts/copilot_hook_guard.py --event postToolUseFailure } else { '{}' }
